author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: The decode step does ~600 CUDA API calls per token, each with ~1ms driver overhead = 0.99s/tok. CUDA graphs capture all 600 ops into a single replayable graph, reducing per-token cost to a single cudaGraphLaunch (~10us). Requirements: (1) GPU memory pool with fixed addresses (CUDA graphs replay at same memory locations), (2) Stream capture of one decode step, (3) Graph instantiation + replay loop. Expected speedup: 20-100x on decode. Approach: use cudarc's stream capture API (begin_capture/end_capture/instantiate/launch).
